140139804        float zmm5 = arg1[1]
14013980c        float zmm4 = *arg1
140139822        int128_t zmm6 = arg1[2]

140139843        if (not(result f<= 0f))
14013984d        float zmm1 = 1f f/ result

14013985d        *arg1 = zmm4 * zmm1
140139861        arg1[1] = zmm5 * zmm1
140139866        arg1[2] = zmm6.d
140139873        return result
